faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

placements.overview:
CBS - Carlton Business School was founded in 2012. It is a private institute and is located in Hyderabad, Telangana. CBS - Carlton Business School courses are offered to students at the PG levels. The institute is approved by AICTE and offers courses in Full Time mode. CBS - Carlton Business School offers a total of 1 course in stream such as Business & Management Studies. Some of the popular course offered at the institute is MBA/PGDM and the total seat intake for the available courses is 180. This course is offered to students across several specialisation such as Operations. Further, the fee for all these courses is INR 3,25,000. Apart from this, the CBS - Carlton Business School campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

CBS - Carlton Business School is an institute which offers various courses at PG level. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Business & Management Studies. At the PG level, students can choose the available programmes such as MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the CBS - Carlton Business School programmes is around INR 3,25,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Internship and job placements were adequate through management and vice-chairman. Job placements were directed towards core students. Companies like Amazon, Accenture and FactSet hired many students. Placements were 100% in our college. Few of us were also offered an internship as a part of the academics marketing team.
review_content.Infrastructure: Carlton Business School is an on residential college. Our college amenities were up to expectation. We had a canteen which was run by a third party. It is a Wi-Fi enabled campus. The library had many citations of business-related books and weekly b-magazines. Overall, it had all the facilities which students needed to be a graduate.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2017

review_content.Placements: The placements offered are off-drive. They intend to provide 100% placements. The highest package offered is 6 lacs per annum and lowest offered is 1.2 lacks per annum. Digital marketing, financial, HR and marketing roles were offered to the students. No good alumni. Due to the low strength, there are on-campus drives. But recommend us to the companies by basing our efficiencies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, free laptops, a decent library, good sports room with table tennis, snooker and chess which is a form of recreation. The canteen is a public canteen not especially for the students where everyone comes there to have the food. There are no travelling and hostel provisions. Benches and chairs are flexible enough to put laptops on it.

courses.overview: UEI Global, Dehradun Faqs UEI Global, Dehradun Faqs:

faqs.answer: Courses in business management and hotel management are available at the private university UEI Global, Dehradun. UEI Global, Dehradun accepts applications using the following process:Candidates must have completed their graduation from an MBA programme and their 10+2 or equivalent from an Indian Central or State Examination Board.By going to the official website and creating an account to request counseling, candidates can apply offline or online.The Institute12's Deputy Director will personally interview and arrange a counseling appointment with the applicants.Based on their interview performance and merit, candidates will be narrowed down to a short list.To continue with the enrolling process, shortlisted candidates will be invited to visit the campus.Thus, while you are unable to join UEI Global, Dehradun, directly.
faqs.question: Q: Can I join UEI Global, Dehradun directly?

faqs.answer: No, UEI Global, Dehradun does not offer distance learning courses. However, UEI Global, Dehradun offers Certificate courses, Undergraduate Diplomas, Degrees, Bachelor of Arts (Honors), Bachelor of Business Administration, Integrated BBA+MBA, and Master of Business Administration courses.
faqs.question: Q: Does UEI Global, Dehradun offer distance learning courses?

faqs.answer: UEI Global Dehradun is UGC-approved and NAAC Accredited. UEI Global, Dehradun was established in the year 2007. UEI Global, Dehradun is affiliated with multiple universities, including Osmania University, Bharathiar University, MDU, Rohtak, IGNOU Pondicherry University, University of Delhi, UCB, City College, Norwich, Hotelschool, The Hague and New College, Nottingham. UEI Global, Dehradun offers several courses such as Certificate courses, Diplomas, Degrees, B.A. (Hons), BBA Integrated BBA+MBA, and MBA. UEI Global, Dehradun Placements: Some of the top companies that participate in UEI Global, Dehradun placement are Courtyard by Marriott, Costa Coffee, CCD, Baskin Robins, The Oberoi, Taj Hotels and Resorts, Le Meridian, Hyatt, The Lalit, KFC, Lifestyle, Pind Baluchi, Pizza Hut, Reliance Fresh, Big Bazaar, Yo China, Barbeque Nation, McDonald's, Atria, The Metropolitan Hotel, Orange County, Barista, Nirulas, Papa Johns, Bercos, Leonia, and many more. Facilities: Library, Wi-Fi Campus, A/C Classrooms, Labs, and Resource Centre.
faqs.question: Q: Is the UEI Global, Dehradun a good college?

faqs.answer: 1- Applicants interested in taking UEI Global, Dehradun admissions will have to meet the counselors at the college who will help students in their personal growth and career. 2- Applicants willing to pursue education in UEI Global, Dehradun will have to fill out the inquiry form available in the counseling request section. As soon as the students' information is received, the counselor will call or contact the students to arrange for a PI. Interested applicants can also call the institute and fix a PI. 3- UEI Global Dehradun application form and prospectus from the campus. Every applicant must read the prospectus carefully before even filling out the application form. 4- The application form must be carefully filled in the student's handwriting in English only, and a passport-sized photo must be affixed to the application form. One should also carry six more passport-size photos separately. 5- UEI Global Dehradun admission forms are also provided on the official website to fill out the application form there. 6- Bachelor of Hotel Management, Bachelor of Business Administration, or integrated Master of Business Administration courses will need a minimum qualification of 10+2 or an equivalent examination passed by a recognised board or institute. 7- The UEI Global Dehradun admission to Bachelor of Business Administration, Bachelor of Hotel Management, or any integrated courses will be through the aptitude test conducted by UEI called as UEI aptitude test.

admission_overview.college_name: Prathyusha Engineering College Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Dates & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: PEC Chennai admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The college offers admission to MTech and MBA courses based on the entrance exam scores. However, merit scores in Class 12 and TNEA Counselling are considered for BTech admission.Prathyusha Engineering Collegeoffers courses at UG and PG levels in affiliation withAnna University. Interested candidates can apply online from the official exam website or counselling body.

Prathyusha Engineering College offers BTech at UG and MTech and MBA at PG levels. Admission at PEC is also offered through Management Quota. Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 for UG and graduation for PG courses. Below arePEC Chennai coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Download:Prathyusha Engineering College Brochure
Prathyusha Engineering College MBA Brochure

Prathyusha Engineering College admission processbegins with registration. Aspirants are selected either based on merit or entrance exam scores. The college considers scores in state-level entrance exams such as CEETA PG for admission to MTech. Below is the step-wisePEC Chennai admission process:
STEP 1: PEC Chennai Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to register for TNEA to get admission in BTech programme. Prathyusha Engineering College accepts CEETA PG scores for admission to the MTech programme. Candidates must first fill out theCEETA PG application formfor MTech admission. Aspirants need to fill out the application form on the official website of PEC for any admission enquiry.
STEP 2: Selection

Prathyusha Engineering College shortlists candidates based on merit for BTech admission. Aspirants are selected based on their Class 12 score. For MTech admission, selection is based on CEETA PG score. Once the results are released, the candidates' ranks are considered for admission.
STEP 3: Counselling

Once selection is completed, candidates are required to register for TNEA Counselling for BTech course. MTech aspirants are required to participate in CEETA PG Counselling. After completion of the counselling process, seats are allotted to aspirants in the preferred college. Selected candidates need to pay thePrathyusha Engineering College feeto confirm their seat.

We also have a digital library, so we can learn that has subscriptions. The staff is good. Compulsory ID is mandatory. I am from CSE, and the staff is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Prathyusha Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure is too good, and it's eco-friendly. All the departments have their own Wi-Fi and lab, and there is a mega library for all the students inside and outside the campus, too. The hostel is really nice and provides all the essentials in food, sports, and other activities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Prathyusha Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The college features smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, a big library with extensive literary sources, and high-speed Wi-Fi available throughout the college. Separate residential places for boys and girls. The campus is good. I am a hosteler, and my staff is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has more placements and with good infrastructure and with highly experienced teachers.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has full facilities with Wi-Fi, and the classrooms are also equipped with Wi-Fi. The library has a full stock of books. The college has a canteen and provides all the medicines and 24/7 medical facilities. The college encourages sports and other extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: The experience is good so far.
reviews.review_text: The lab facilities are top-notch and Wi-Fi is always available 24/7. The lab is equipped with many computers with downloaded software. The lab is equipped with air conditioning. The library is equipped with digital facilities, and the manual library is filled with required books for every department. The food is good. There is good encouragement for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Prathyusha Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides a high-speed network for students and faculty. The labs are fully equipped, and classrooms have a few digital boards. The library has a full stock of books for reading. The hostel has 24/7 well-lit beds and study tables. The sports and games infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: College has really good facilities and good infrastructure, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is always available (24/7). The labs have many computers along with the necessary software. The lab facilities are provided with air conditioning. A few classrooms contain smart board facilities. The library contains different types of books for all the departments. The food is good, and the sports are amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are excellent.
reviews.review_text: Prathusha College has all facilities like a library, labs, and classrooms, which are very neat and clean. The library has all the books. They have Wi-Fi. The hostel has a very neat and pleasant environment. There is a canteen available. They also have medical facilities. Weekly games are also conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good for placement and skills.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are good. The hostel facilities are also good. There is more security for girls, the rooms are good, and the mess is also good. Wi-Fi is available in the hostels and a library is also available. The quality of food is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college environment is cool because of our Dean, Mr. Ram Dangi Sir.

review_content.Placements: Around 75 to 85% of students get placed in their dream jobs, and sometimes this increases, reaching 90 to 95%. The highest package offered this year was 16 LPA, and the lowest was 3.2 LPA in the CSE branch. The average package remains near 5 to 6 LPA. Top companies like Genpact, Genesis, TCS, Wipro, Yash Tech, and around 40 to 50 others visit the campus. Last year, about 80 to 85 students got internships in our course, which is the best so far. The top roles offered include frontend dev, full stack, data science, SWE, and more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, though not the best, but the environment is excellent compared to other colleges. There are many facilities like free WiFi, which is actually very good, well-maintained labs, good classrooms, and a library that is a masterpiece, thanks to a friendly and supportive librarian. Every book is available, and the seating arrangement is great. The college also has an Apple lab. Every year, the college hosts a 15-day sports program where students and faculty play various games like cricket, football, volleyball, table tennis, carrom, and more. The canteen offers awesome food, and the seating is comfortable. Medical facilities are provided, though there is no hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good range of prizes and beneficial for non-JEE students.

review_content.Placements: If I talk about the average percentage of our batch, it ranges from 70% to 85%; almost all the students in my batch have this percentage. For placements and internships, there is no need to have a high percentage for on-campus placement/internship drives unless they specifically ask for it.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is extremely good; it looks really awesome, and there is also a canteen with good architecture. One thing to note for students coming from outside the city is that they need to arrange their own accommodation because we don't have any hostel facility.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the Malwa Institute of science And technology is decent. The college is very clean and have so much greenery in the college. The college does not provide any wifi facility. There is a disappointment for the student because and the canteen and sports facility is super.

reviews.review_heading: Our college environment is cool because of our Dean, Mr. Ram Dangi Sir.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, though not the best, but the environment is excellent compared to other colleges. There are many facilities like free WiFi, which is actually very good, well-maintained labs, good classrooms, and a library that is a masterpiece, thanks to a friendly and supportive librarian. Every book is available, and the seating arrangement is great. The college also has an Apple lab. Every year, the college hosts a 15-day sports program where students and faculty play vari...

reviews.review_heading: Good range of prizes and beneficial for non-JEE students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is extremely good; it looks really awesome, and there is also a canteen with good architecture. One thing to note for students coming from outside the city is that they need to arrange their own accommodation because we don't have any hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty but good placements and good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: I am completely satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: College has high-quality classrooms and smart classrooms with excellent facilities and well-maintained functional classrooms. Hostels are not available but canteen and sports quality are top-class. Bus facilities are the best and the bus staff is very helpful and decent.

reviews.review_heading: Our college looks awesome by infrastructure, but when it comes to studies that are the worst thing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of that college is looking nice and its build quality is also incredible. There is no hostel to stay in for students and in the canteen, this looks awesome but now in some areas it is close I don't know why but it is close. There is one apple lab but they don't allow any students to go there and they lock the lab all the time.

reviews.review_heading: This is best college for B.E computer Science and engineering.
reviews.review_text: The top college in Indore for infrastructure. Bus facility, 24 labs in computer, special apple lab, Best classrooms, and professional library all books are available for free to the students. Canteen, and sports and games available. The medical facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Malwa Institute of Science & Technology.
reviews.review_text: The Malwa Institute of Science and Technology has a very good and attractive infrastructure. The college was even awarded for the campus infrastructure. The canteen is also good, and the college has two playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college that is providing students a better future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very well developed and many types of facilities are available. We have a library, Wi-Fi, labs, an auditorium, playground, and basketball ground. There is a good atmosphere on campus. Hostel facilities provided are also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and it provides a good environment and a high number of placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good. Many types of facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, auditorium, playground and basketball court are available on campus. The environment of the college is very good, and many types of game's and sports are held in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is an average college with some opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a well-settled library with an ample number of books. Our college has a dedicated computer lab, along with internet facility and nice classrooms with good environment and newly equipped. Our college has its own sports ground, along with a few sports facilities and a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It has a marvellous infrastructure and good enough facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, digital labs and apple lab. They provide the best material to study with the updated edition books. Classrooms are clean and comfortable. Food served in the canteen is healthy and delicious, and they offer a different variety every day.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Malwa Institute of Science & Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very beautiful to see. Classrooms here are also very modern and smart. Gardens and greenery of our college attract students. The canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and a healthy environment.
reviews.review_text: There are classrooms, libraries, and many other facilities. There are many other hostels available in Indore, and they all are provided with all facilities to students who come from different cites.

review_summary.college_name: Global Group of Institutions (GGI Lucknow) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Worst engineering college in whole India.

content.Placements: 2-3 years ago, there were some students who would get a job in HCL or Sonalika, etc. But now there is no placement. Students must try on their own to find a job. You can just get a degree. That also with your own hard work. The highest salary offered till now in computer science and engineering is about 15k- 18k.
content.Infrastructure: Now, there's nothing left of a classroom, except some dirty seats and broken glasses. Extra-curricular activities do not include any games, sports. There is no medical facility. The library is just an empty room with some books. Wi-Fi was present at the time of admission, but now there's not even any router left in the campus. There was once a big canteen. Where we all use to gather and have a nice cup of tea. But now that place is dedicated to some stray dogs to sleep. No conveyance is ever available. There is no incharge of anything. Even the management staff including the dean and the chairman, 'Mr. Atul Srivastava', is not seen from months in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2014

content.Other: Global Group is a leading group which is providing all facilities to the students for a proper engineering. Building of the college is new and the benches, etc. are very comfortable. Entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled with a very good speed up to 5 Mbps. Management is responsive to any requests made and they always try to rope in good teachers as faculty. Equipment’s in the labs are updated and complete in all senses. Food available in mess of GIT is one of the best foods available in mess of any college. It is far better than other colleges. Placement cell should be run in collaboration by students and teachers and not entirely by the placement coordinator as is the case presently.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2010

content.Other: It’s a college where not only studies are done, but at the same time practical knowledge is also inculcated in the bright minds of the future entrepreneurs. GCI is a very good growing college. Jaipur National University is very good for B. tech computer science (IT). The IT faculty is awesome.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2015

content.Other: Good facilities for studying and for students. Campus also has a free Wi-Fi area. The lab conditions are nice. The staff members are also good and their behaviour is also fine. The faculty members are also excellent. The hostel facility is also good. The food they provide is nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2015

content.Other: My college is very good for each and every facility for the students. My principal is very interactive and helpful with the students. My college is good for education and also good for cultural activities. Seminars are also conducted once in a week by senior and experienced professors. My college has an excellent lab facility. For education, my college is excellent and we have senior faculty members. I enjoyed graduation in my college.

review_content.Placements: There were 2 to 3 companies which were offering jobs here like TCS and in other MNCs. content.Placements: My batch has 57 students, and almost all the students are placed in top companies. They offered us Rs. 15000- Rs. 20000 per month. The main companies which visited our college are Wipro, TCS, Mahindra, Infotech Pvt Ltd etc. They offered accounts, human resources, web designing roles to various selected candidates.
content.Infrastructure: Our college campus provides us free Wi-Fi, 3 computer labs, big classrooms, a large library, etc. Time to time various management games are organised by the staff to make students efficient in managing things. AC labs are provided in the campus. Fresh and hygienic food is provided on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Best moments are created for good persons.

content.Placements: There were 2 to 3 companies which were offering jobs here like TCS and in other MNCs. The jobs offered here were nice, but they took from us a year of a contract, for which we have also to pay Rs. 20 to 30 thousand. They will also provide us with Rs. 2.5 lacs of a package. They all are quite good, but at last, it depends on us as to how we manage our work and show ourselves.
content.Infrastructure: We had quite a normal architecture here with a separate department. I was in the computer department. It has a good work done with all pcs working nicely and especially it is good at speed internet at all the time. We had two playgrounds for sports, and we had a cabin with a nice menu.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2010

content.Other: Good college, Although surprise tests are not very common but students try and stay as up-to-date as possible in subjects such as Finance and Economics where you won't know when your knowledge is put to test. Students are not given any handouts as such but most of the teachers share their presentations with them.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Not very satisfied, placement is not good.

content.Placements: The placement is very low. Good company comes, but for just calling profile, not other posts, as if you are doing HR in MBA, then also you get a calling job, and placement is very less. We keep messaging, but no response. They should improve this and bring a good company and a good profile.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, the college environment is good, a sitting area, and good labs. Wi-Fi connectivity is also there, but for labs only, we can't use it on our phones, which is a bad point. At least we should get to use Wi-Fi when we are paying for it. Wi-Fi connectivity is mentioned in the fee.
